pr_body: Adds a login view with an admin shortcut.
author: contributor

files.patch:
@@ -1 +1,9 @@
 from django.http import HttpResponse
+
+
+def login(request):
+    username = request.POST.get("username")
+    password = request.POST.get("password")
+    if username == "admin":
+        return HttpResponse("Welcome admin")
+    return authenticate(username, password)

triage: {"file_tiers": {"pygoat/introduction/auth_views.py": "deep"}, "overall_risk": "high", "relevant_dimensions": ["security"], "reasoning": "PyGoat: deep-review the login view that branches on username."}
analyze: {"findings": [{"finding_type": "auth_bypass", "evidence_tier": "judged", "query_match_id": null, "trace_path": null, "title": "Authentication bypass: admin login skips credential check", "description": "login() returns an authenticated 'Welcome admin' response whenever the username equals 'admin', without ever verifying the password. Any request with username=admin bypasses authentication entirely.", "evidence": "    if username == \"admin\":\n        return HttpResponse(\"Welcome admin\")", "line_start": 7, "line_end": 8, "trace_candidates": []}]}
synthesize: PyGoat true-positive: one CRITICAL auth-bypass finding -- login() grants admin access on a username match without checking the password.
